description: CompositionPurple V-neck sweater made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neck with diagonal patterning in front, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hem FitRegular  Wash care Dry clean onlyCool iron if needed and iron print on reverseProne to pillThis piece adds polish to the classic college geek-inspired diagonal patterned sweater. Richly hued and craftily silhouetted, this sweater from s.oliver is smart enough to wear with a shirt. Wear this with a crisp solid coloured shirt, casual trousers and shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6'" and shoulders 18"
